summary: Tested VocoLens landing page and backend APIs. Landing page renders correctly with QR code, status, steps, and store links. Backend APIs for journal/status and usage/status work correctly. One issue: /api/tunnel-url returns 404 externally because /api/* routes are proxied to FastAPI backend which doesn't have that endpoint.

critical.issue: Returns 404 - Kubernetes ingress routes /api/* to FastAPI backend (port 8001), but this endpoint only exists in the Node.js landing page server (port 3000). Browser-side polling for dynamic QR updates will fail.

integration_issues.flow: Dynamic QR code update via polling
integration_issues.issue: Client-side fetch('/api/tunnel-url') will always get 404 from FastAPI backend. Initial page load embeds tunnel URL server-side so QR works, but dynamic updates (if tunnel restarts) won't work.

action_items: Add /tunnel-url endpoint to FastAPI backend (server.py) OR rename the landing page endpoint from /api/tunnel-url to /tunnel-url (non-api prefix) so it's not intercepted by backend routing. Recommended: rename to /tunnel-url in server.js and update the client-side fetch call to match.
critical_code_review_comments: /api/tunnel-url route collision: The Node.js server.js handles /api/tunnel-url on port 3000, but the ingress sends all /api/* to port 8001 (FastAPI). The client-side JavaScript polls /api/tunnel-url which gets 404. Fix: either add the endpoint to FastAPI backend, or change the route to /tunnel-url (without /api prefix) and update the fetch() call in server.js.

success_rate.frontend: 90% (landing page renders correctly with QR code; dynamic polling broken)

feature_checklist.landing_page_loads_with_qr: PASS - QR code visible showing exp://y-fws0e-anonymous-8081.exp.direct
feature_checklist.status_shows_ready: PASS - '✓ Dev server ready — scan QR code with Expo Go'
feature_checklist.app_store_links: PASS - Both App Store and Google Play links present
feature_checklist.usage_status_returns_data: PASS - monthly/total minutes, limit data returned
feature_checklist.tunnel_url_endpoint: FAIL - 404 due to /api/* routing to FastAPI

context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page works (server-side renders QR code). The only issue is /api/tunnel-url 404 due to ingress routing all /api/* to FastAPI. Fix the route name in server.js or add endpoint to FastAPI. After fix, test that the client-side polling updates QR dynamically.
